hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); base=$(basename "$file"); if echo "$base" | grep -qE '^\.env($|\.)' && ! echo "$base" | grep -qE '\.(example|sample|template|dist)$' && ! echo "$base" | grep -q '^example\.env$'; then echo "Blocked: secret file $file" >&2; exit 1; fi

file=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.md$'; then prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
